name: Garbanzo Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mori-Nu 1% tofu cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the barbeque sauce in a large pan.
2. Add the garlic and onion to the pan. Cook until fragrant.
3. Stir in the mashed tomatoes, ensuring they are fully incorporated.
4. Add the cinnamon.
5. Pour in the garbanzo beans.
6. Add the tofu pieces.
7. Heat everything together until well combined and heated through.
8. Mix gently and serve.
